Description: Verify a new user can register with valid details
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /register 2. Enter full name, email, password 3. Click Register
Test Data: Name: John Doe, Email: john@test.com, Password: Test@1234
Expected Output: User account created; redirected to login page with success message
Actual Output: New user account was created successfully and the system redirected to the login page with a success confirmation message

Description: Verify a registered user can log in successfully
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter email and password 3. Click Login
Expected Output: User is authenticated; authUser saved in localStorage; redirected to dashboard
Actual Output: User authenticated successfully; authUser object stored in localStorage; redirected to user dashboard

Description: Verify admin login fails with wrong password
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /admin-login 2. Enter wrong password 3. Click Login
Expected Output: Error message displayed; no redirect; user stays on login page
Actual Output: Login failed with an error message Invalid credentials displayed; page remained on admin login screen

Description: Verify a book PDF loads correctly in the reader
Preconditions: User is logged in; book with PDF exists
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Navigate to /reading/:bookId 3. Wait for PDF to render
Test Data: bookId: valid book ID with PDF file
Expected Output: PDF renders on canvas; total pages shown; page 1 displayed
Actual Output: PDF rendered correctly on canvas element; total page count shown in toolbar; page 1 displayed by default

Description: Verify auto-advance turns pages automatically at set speed
Test Steps: 1. Open a book 2. Enable Auto-Advance mode 3. Set speed to 10 seconds 4. Wait for timer
Expected Output: Page advances automatically after 10 seconds; countdown timer visible
Actual Output: Auto-advance mode activated; countdown timer appeared on screen and page turned automatically after 10 seconds

Description: Verify reading progress is saved when page changes
Preconditions: User is logged in; book is open
Test Steps: 1. Open a book at page 1 2. Navigate to page 5 3. Close and reopen the book
Expected Output: Book reopens at page 5; progress was saved to backend
Actual Output: Book reopened at page 5 as expected; reading progress was saved successfully to the backend database

Description: Verify user can view their borrowing/activity history
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Navigate to Activity Dashboard 3. View history section
Expected Output: List of borrowed books with dates and actions displayed
Actual Output: Activity Dashboard loaded and displayed a chronological list of borrowed books with timestamps and action labels

Description: Verify reading statistics (streak; velocity; books read) are shown
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Open Activity Dashboard 3. Check stats panel
Expected Output: Reading velocity; current streak; and books read count displayed correctly
Actual Output: Stats panel displayed reading velocity; current streak count; and total books read with correct values from the database

Description: Verify a user can submit a bug report with message and rating
Preconditions: User is logged in; feedback page accessible
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Feedback page 2. Select type Bug 3. Enter message 4. Give 4-star rating 5. Click Submit
Test Data: Type: bug, Message: PDF loading is slow, Rating: 4
Expected Output: Feedback submitted successfully; success confirmation shown
Actual Output: Feedback form submitted successfully; a success message was displayed and the feedback was recorded in the system

Description: Verify admin can view and approve/reject user feedback
Preconditions: Admin is logged in; at least one feedback exists
Test Steps: 1. Login as admin 2. Open Admin Dashboard 3. Navigate to Feedback section 4. Approve a feedback entry
Expected Output: Feedback status updated to Approved; visible in dashboard
Actual Output: Admin approved the feedback entry; status updated to Approved and reflected immediately in the admin dashboard

Description: Verify user can add a book to their bookshelf
Preconditions: User is logged in; book exists in library
Test Steps: 1. Browse books 2. Click Add to Bookshelf on a book 3. Go to Bookshelf page
Expected Output: Book appears in user's bookshelf list
Actual Output: Book was added to the bookshelf; it appeared in the Bookshelf page under the correct reading list category

Description: Verify user can remove a book from their bookshelf
Preconditions: User has at least one book in bookshelf
Test Steps: 1. Go to Bookshelf page 2. Click Remove/Trash icon on a book 3. Confirm removal
Expected Output: Book removed from bookshelf; toast notification shown
Actual Output: Book was removed from the bookshelf immediately; a toast notification confirmed the removal action

Description: Verify all available books are displayed on the Books page
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Navigate to Books page 3. View book listings
Expected Output: Book cards with title; author; cover image displayed
Actual Output: Books page loaded all available books as cards showing title; author name; genre and cover image correctly

Description: Verify admin can add a new book with all required fields
Test Steps: 1. Login as admin 2. Open Admin Dashboard 3. Click Add Book 4. Fill in title, author, description, PDF file 5. Submit
Test Data: Title: Clean Code, Author: Robert Martin, Genre: Technology
Expected Output: New book saved; appears in book list; available to users
Actual Output: New book Clean Code was saved successfully; it appeared in the admin book list and was accessible to regular users

Description: Verify the advanced search bar returns relevant results
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Search page 2. Type a book title in search bar 3. Press Enter or click Search
Expected Output: List of matching books displayed; results filtered by title
Actual Output: Search returned a filtered list of books matching the query Clean Code with correct titles and cover images

Description: Verify search queries are saved to user's search history
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Go to Search Hub 3. Search for Python 4. Go back to Search Hub
Expected Output: Python appears in search history list below search bar
Actual Output: The query Python was saved to search history and appeared in the history section when the user returned to the Search Hub page

Description: Verify bookmark logic in Reading.jsx
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to a specific page. 2. Click Bookmark icon.
Expected Output: Bookmark icon changes state. Page number is saved to the user's bookmark list.
Actual Output: Bookmark icon updated visually and page bookmarked successfully.

Description: Verify highlighting text in Reading.jsx
Test Steps: 1. Select a block of text. 2. Click the Highlight option.
Expected Output: Selected text background turns yellow (or designated highlight color).
Actual Output: Text was successfully highlighted visually on the screen.

Description: Verify borrowing a book in BookPage.jsx
Preconditions: User is logged in. Book is available.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to a specific BookPage. 2. Click Borrow button.
Expected Output: Button changes to Borrowed, success notification appears, and book is added to active library.
Actual Output: System updated status to Borrowed and displayed success message.

Description: Verify progress updates in Reading.jsx
Preconditions: User is reading a borrowed book.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Reading.jsx. 2. Turn several pages. 3. Return to Dashboard.
Expected Output: System saves the last read page. Activity Dashboard displays accurate progress percentage.
Actual Output: Reading progress successfully saved and reflected accurately on the dashboard.
